posts.text: Transcripts are rich input, not final truth. Great pipelines separate raw transcripts from cleaned versions. Skip this and automation inherits every filler word and false start. Small teams need cleaner handoffs, not more tools. Episode 14 with Maya Chen is live.

What embarrassing error slipped through your podcast workflow—a wrong name, broken link, mismatched metadata? Pipeline improvements start with honest post-mortems. Episode 14 explores how small teams build reliable systems.
